description: Perform a complete Earned Value Management (EVM) status update cycle for the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' using 'sample_project.xml'. Set the project baseline and update the project status date to February 10, 2025. Record 100% completion for 'Requirements Gathering', 'System Architecture Design', 'Database Schema Design', 'UI/UX Wireframes', 'Design Review Milestone', and 'Database Implementation'. Set 'Backend API Development' and 'Frontend Development' to 70% completion. Export an Earned Value report to ~/Projects/earned_value_report.pdf and save the updated project file to ~/Projects/project_status_update.xml.
